title: Bubbles Reverted
description: Remove the newly added empty air bubble texture added in 1.21.2 pre-release 1!
body:
Bubbles Reverted

- Revert the empty bubble texture that was added in 1.21.2 pre-release 1! - Just made the texture transparent. ---
![A comparison between the new empty bubble texture and with it removed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5296b07e04294873ca19c0d2a1fc1fc87d83157.png)
